name: SearXNG MCP Server
what_it_does: SearXNG MCP server enabling AI agents to perform privacy-respecting web searches via SearXNG — a free, open-source metasearch engine — querying multiple search engines simultaneously, accessing search results without tracking, and integrating privacy-first web search into agent-driven research and information retrieval workflows using self-hosted or public SearXNG instances.
use_cases: Performing privacy-first web searches from research agents
Querying multiple search engines simultaneously from information gathering agents
Building search-enabled agents without commercial API costs from frugal agents
Self-hosted search infrastructure for enterprise agent platforms
Accessing search results without user tracking from privacy-focused agents
Federated search across web, images, and news from multi-source research agents
not_for: Teams needing guaranteed SLA (self-hosted SearXNG depends on instance reliability)
Teams needing Google-specific or Bing-specific features
Organizations without ability to self-host or use public SearXNG instances
best_when: An agent needs privacy-respecting web search without commercial API costs — particularly for self-hosted agent platforms where a local SearXNG instance provides unlimited search.
avoid_when: You need guaranteed uptime SLA, specific commercial search API features, or don't have access to a SearXNG instance.

auth.notes: No authentication required for public SearXNG instances. Self-hosted instances may have optional auth. Just need SearXNG instance URL.

pricing.free_tier_limits: SearXNG: completely free and open source
pricing.notes: SearXNG is free open source (AGPL). Self-host for unlimited searches. Public instances available free. Community MCP is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted: no limits; public instances: may enforce rate limits

known_agent_gotchas: SearXNG instance URL must be configured — no default public instance
Public SearXNG instances may block automated requests or have downtime
Self-hosted instance recommended for reliability and higher rate limits
Result quality varies by which search engines are enabled in the SearXNG config
Community MCP from individual contributor — SearXNG API is stable
JSON output format must be enabled in SearXNG instance settings
agent_readiness.security_notes: No API key needed. HTTPS recommended for SearXNG instance. Self-hosted for full data control. Community MCP. Privacy-focused by design — no user tracking.

security_score_components.security_notes: No auth. HTTPS for instance. Self-hosted data control. Community MCP. Privacy-first design.
